name: Mom's Cranberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
2. Spread cranberries over the bottom of the plate and sprinkle with half a cup of sugar and chopped nuts.
3. Beat eggs well; gradually add one cup of sugar and beat until thoroughly mixed.
4. Add flour, melted margarine, and melted shortening (Crisco), beating well.
5. Pour batter over cranberries and bake at 325°F for about 45 to 60 minutes -- until golden brown. Serve with vanilla ice cream.
